lemon_market_new_listings.description: Mint condition.

The car is in poor condition. The exterior has significant damage and the interior shows heavy wear and tear. It has major mechanical issues and will require extensive repairs to be fully operational.

This vehicle is in poor condition. The exterior has significant body damage and rust. The interior is heavily worn with torn upholstery and missing trim. The engine and transmission require major repairs.

Ready for a dependable ride that won't break the bank? This vehicle is a fantastic find for anyone seeking a solid, functional car with plenty of character! While it shows some honest signs of its travels over the years—including some visible wear and tear and cosmetic imperfections—it remains a reliable companion that's ready for many more miles. It's the perfect choice for a budget-conscious buyer who appreciates a car that gets the job done with a positive spirit!

This vehicle is in fair condition and has served as a dependable daily driver for several years. While it remains mechanically operational, the exterior shows its age with several noticeable scuffs on the rear bumper, a small ding on the driver-side fender, and some fading in the clear coat on the roof. Inside, the cabin is functional but shows wear, including some staining on the floor mats and a small tear in the driver's seat upholstery. It runs and drives, but a potential buyer should be prepared for some upcoming maintenance, such as new brake pads and a suspension check-up to address a minor rattle.

This vehicle is in truly mint condition, representing a rare find for any discerning buyer. The exterior paint is flawless, retaining its original showroom shine with absolutely no scratches, dents, or imperfections. Mechanically, the car performs perfectly; the engine runs silently and powerful, while the transmission provides seamless, crisp shifts. The interior is equally pristine, with the upholstery still firm and every electronic component functioning exactly as intended. It has been meticulously stored in a climate-controlled garage and serviced exclusively by authorized specialists. This is a collector-grade example that drives as beautifully as it looks, offering a 'like-new' experience for its next owner.

Presented for your consideration is an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber. This vehicle is in pristine condition, having been maintained to the most exacting standards. Every facet, from the flawless exterior finish to the preserved interior surfaces, reflects a level of care synonymous with showroom quality. This is a rare opportunity for the discerning collector to acquire a vehicle that remains in its original, untouched state. We invite you to experience this benchmark of automotive excellence.

Hey! You have to see this beauty in person! I've babied this car since day one, and it’s still in absolutely flawless, showroom condition. It drives like a dream and honestly looks like it just left the dealership for the first time. I’m sad to let it go, but I know the next owner is going to love it just as much as I do. Come take a look and see for yourself!

This is a concours-level 2004 BMW M3 (E46) featuring the high-revving S54 3.2L straight-six, complete with individual throttle bodies and Double VANOS variable valve timing. Mechanically flawless, the rod bearings and rear subframe reinforcement have been proactively addressed to ensure structural integrity. The Getrag 6-speed manual gearbox offers precise throws, coupled with a factory limited-slip differential for optimal torque distribution. The suspension maintains its original damping characteristics and bushing integrity, ensuring razor-sharp turn-in and lateral stability. The paint depth is consistent across all panels, and the Nappa leather interior remains supple with no bolster wear. A rare, turn-key example for the purist seeking peak atmospheric performance.
Used car. Mint condition. Garage kept. No mechanical issues. Clean title. Serious buyers only.

This pristine vehicle is a true showroom-quality masterpiece, maintained to the highest possible standards. The exterior features a deep, mirror-like finish entirely free of swirl marks, stone chips, or imperfections, paired with immaculate alloy wheels. Inside, the cabin is a time capsule; the premium leather remains supple and scent-fresh, with zero signs of wear on the bolsters or touchpoints. Every electronic component and luxury feature functions exactly as it did the day it left the factory. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, benefiting from a documented, open-checkbook service history and climate-controlled garage storage. This is a rare, collector-grade example that offers a 'like-new' driving experience for the most discerning enthusiast.

This exceptional vehicle represents the pinnacle of automotive preservation. Presented in showroom condition, it features an impeccable exterior finish and a pristine interior that retains its original factory allure. Meticulously maintained and mechanically flawless, this motorcar offers an uncompromising driving experience for the discerning collector who demands nothing less than perfection.

Presented for your consideration is an exemplary specimen of automotive excellence, preserved in a state of absolute refinement. This vehicle has been maintained to the highest standards, exhibiting a flawless exterior luster and a cabin that remains in showroom condition. Every component reflects a history of fastidious care and uncompromising attention to detail. This is an investment-grade acquisition intended for the discerning driver who accepts nothing less than a pristine, turn-key experience.

Hey there! I’m so excited to share this absolute gem with you. Honestly, it’s in such incredible, pristine condition—it basically feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve babied this car from day one, and it’s been kept spotless inside and out. It drives like an absolute dream and is ready for its next adventure. You’ve gotta see it in person to believe how beautiful it is. Can't wait for it to find a great new home!

Offered is an investment-grade E46 M3, showcasing a pristine S54 inline-six equipped with individual throttle bodies and a recently overhauled VANOS system. This chassis features a reinforced rear subframe and a refreshed suspension geometry utilizing Bilstein PSS10 coilovers for neutral handling dynamics. Power is delivered through a crisp ZF 6-speed manual to a variable M differential lock. The exterior retains its factory depth with zero paint correction required, while the undercarriage remains concours-clean. Comprehensive mechanical maintenance is documented, including preventative rod bearing replacement and shim-and-bucket valve adjustments, ensuring peak volumetric efficiency and a linear power band.
Mint condition. Flawless exterior and interior. Zero mechanical issues. Full service history included. Clean title.

This vehicle is a pristine example of automotive care, presenting in truly showroom-ready condition. Meticulously maintained by a single owner and stored in a climate-controlled garage, the exterior features a flawless finish with a deep, mirror-like luster and absolutely no rock chips, swirl marks, or imperfections. Inside, the cabin remains in factory-fresh state; the premium leather seating is supple and free of wear, the carpets are spotless, and the interior still carries that new-car scent. Every electronic component, from the high-resolution navigation system to the premium surround-sound audio, operates with precision. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, boasting a comprehensive service history performed exclusively at certified dealerships. It delivers a whisper-quiet ride and responsive performance that feels identical to the day it was first driven. For the discerning buyer seeking a vehicle that is indistinguishable from new, this is an unparalleled find.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to an uncompromising standard that defines automotive excellence. This unit remains in showroom condition, exhibiting a flawless exterior and an interior that retains its original luster and integrity. Every mechanical component has been rigorously inspected to ensure peak performance, offering the discerning buyer a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle of this caliber. For those who demand the finest in quality and presentation, this offering stands as a testament to meticulous stewardship.

Presenting an exceptional example of automotive preservation. This vehicle remains in showroom condition, exhibiting a flawless exterior finish and an interior that retains its original factory luster. Every mechanical component has been meticulously maintained to ensure peak performance. For the discerning enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection, this offering represents a rare opportunity to acquire a truly immaculate specimen.

Hey there! You’ve got to see this beauty. It’s honestly in absolutely perfect shape—like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve babied this car since day one, and it still has that fresh feel and drives like a dream. If you’re looking for something that looks and feels brand new without the brand new price tag, this is definitely the one for you. Come say hi and take it for a spin!

Offering a museum-grade E46 M3, featuring the legendary S54B32 inline-six with individual throttle bodies and a precision-tuned double-VANOS system. This specimen boasts a flawless ZF 6-speed manual gearbox and a factory-spec helical limited-slip differential, ensuring linear power delivery to the rear wheels. The chassis integrity is absolute, with a reinforced subframe and original bushings maintaining factory-spec kinematics. Every mechanical component, from the high-pressure VANOS lines to the cooling system's expansion tank, has been meticulously preserved. This is a turnkey collector-tier vehicle with zero deferred maintenance and perfect compression across all six cylinders.
Mint condition. Flawless exterior and interior. Low mileage. Full service history. Garage kept.

Step into a true showroom experience with this impeccably preserved vehicle. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish entirely free of chips or blemishes, while the interior remains in 'time-capsule' condition, featuring pristine leather and that unmistakable factory-fresh scent. Every mechanical component has been maintained to the highest standard with a full, documented service history from certified specialists. Always garage-kept and never exposed to the elements, this car drives exactly as it did the day it left the lot. For the buyer who accepts nothing less than perfection, this is a rare opportunity to own a collector-grade example in flawless condition.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest possible standards. This specimen remains in showroom condition, exhibiting no discernible wear and possessing a flawless mechanical pedigree. Meticulously preserved and strictly serviced, it represents the pinnacle of its class for the discerning enthusiast who demands nothing short of perfection.

We are pleased to present this superlative vehicle, maintained to an exacting standard that rivals its original showroom state. This unit exemplifies automotive excellence, featuring a flawless exterior finish and a pristine interior cabin that reflects a history of meticulous stewardship. Every mechanical system has undergone a rigorous inspection to ensure peak performance and uncompromising reliability. For the discerning driver who demands nothing less than perfection, this vehicle represents a premier acquisition opportunity.

Hey there! I’m selling my absolute pride and joy, and honestly, she’s a total dream. This car is in truly incredible shape—it looks and drives just like it did the day it left the showroom! It’s been pampered since day one, always garage-kept and meticulously cared for. If you’ve been looking for that perfect, like-new ride without the brand-new price tag, you’ve found it. I’d love for it to go to someone who will enjoy it as much as I have, so come take a look and see for yourself!

Offering a concours-level E46 M3 featuring the high-revving S54B32 power unit. This example boasts a reinforced rear subframe and a comprehensive VANOS overhaul using Beisan Systems components. The Getrag 420G 6-speed manual transmission provides tactile engagement, delivering power through a 3.62 limited-slip differential. Rod bearings have been serviced preventatively, ensuring internal longevity. The chassis dynamics are sharpened by factory-spec bushings and Bilstein dampers, maintaining the platform's exceptional torsional rigidity. Finished in investment-grade condition with zero fluid seepage and a pristine undercarriage, this is a turn-key example for the discerning collector.
Mint condition. Garage kept. No accidents. Clean title. Service records included. Inspection ready.

This vehicle is a true time capsule, presented in absolute showroom condition. The exterior features a deep, mirror-like finish on the original factory paint, entirely free from swirls, stone chips, or door dings. Every panel gap is laser-straight, and the glass is crystal clear without a single pit. Inside, the cabin remains in a breathtaking state; the premium leather upholstery is supple with zero signs of bolster wear, and every tactile surface—from the steering wheel to the switchgear—retains its factory-fresh texture. Mechanically, it is beyond reproach, having been pampered in a climate-controlled garage and maintained with an open-checkbook policy. All service records are meticulously documented, confirming its pedigree. From the pristine undercarriage to the untouched alloy wheels, this car represents the pinnacle of its model. It drives with the precision and silence of a brand-new vehicle, offering a rare opportunity for the discerning collector who demands nothing less than perfection.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to an impeccable standard that reflects a commitment to automotive excellence. This specimen represents the pinnacle of its class, boasting a pristine exterior finish and a showroom-grade interior that remains virtually untouched. Every mechanical component has been rigorously vetted to ensure peak performance, offering a driving experience indistinguishable from its original delivery state. For the discerning enthusiast who demands nothing less than absolute perfection, this offering stands as a testament to uncompromising care and preservation.
